SETTINGS.TITLE: REFERENCE VALUES
SETTINGS.AI_INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: These instructions are injected into every AI interaction. Define your coaching philosophy, preferred workout structures, naming conventions, etc.
SETTINGS.AI_INSTRUCTIONS_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. Always name workouts with the format 'Sport - Type - Duration'. Prefer 1:1 work/rest ratio for VO2max intervals. Never prescribe more than 2 intensity sessions per week.

ONBOARDING.TITLE: Welcome to Koval Training
ONBOARDING.SUBTITLE: Tell us a bit about yourself to get started
ONBOARDING.FIELD_FTP_HINT: Best sustained power ~60 min. Bike zones.
ONBOARDING.FIELD_THRESHOLD_PACE_HINT: Lactate threshold pace. Used for run zones.
ONBOARDING.FIELD_CSS_HINT: Threshold swim pace. Used for swim zones.
ONBOARDING.UNSET_NOTE: Values left empty will show as "not set" — zones and metrics requiring them won't be displayed until you add them in Settings.
ONBOARDING.ERROR_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save. Please try again.
ONBOARDING.SKIP_NOTE: You can update these values anytime in Settings.

DASHBOARD.FOCUS_REST_SUB: No workout scheduled. Recovery is training too.

AI_CHAT.WELCOME_SUBHEADING: Define objectives or request physiological analysis.
AI_CHAT.SUGGESTION_SWEET_SPOT_PROMPT: Create a 1h over/under sweet spot cycling workout and schedule it for Saturday
AI_CHAT.SUGGESTION_FITNESS_CHECK_PROMPT: How is my fitness trending this month and what do I have planned next week?
AI_CHAT.SUGGESTION_GROUP_VO2MAX_PROMPT: Create a VO2max bike session for my group this Wednesday at 6pm
AI_CHAT.SUGGESTION_ENDURANCE_RIDE_PROMPT: Organize a 2h endurance club ride for Saturday morning at 9am
AI_CHAT.ERROR_MESSAGE_TOO_LONG: Your message is too long ({{actual}} characters). Please keep it under {{max}} characters and try again.
AI_CHAT.ERROR_CONNECTION: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting to the assistant. Is the system operational?

CALENDAR_WEEK.LINK_PICKER_EMPTY: No nearby pending workouts found within ±3 days

CLUBS_LIST.EMPTY_SUBTITLE: Create or join a club to start training with others

CLUB_FEED.EMPTY_ICON_LABEL: No activity yet. Be the first to do something!

CLUB_SESSIONS.HEADING: Sessions
CLUB_SESSIONS.FORM_LABEL_OPEN_TO_ALL: Open to all members before session
CLUB_SESSIONS.RECURRING_EDIT_PART_OF_SERIES: This session is part of a recurring series.
CLUB_SESSIONS.CANCEL_ALL_FUTURE_BODY: This will cancel all future sessions for {{title}} and deactivate the recurring template.
CLUB_SESSIONS.CANCEL_SINGLE_BODY: Are you sure you want to cancel {{title}}?

CLUB_LEADERBOARD.EMPTY_NO_ACTIVITY: No activity recorded this week yet.

CLUB_RACE_GOALS.EMPTY_NO_GOALS: No race goals from club members yet.

COACH_DASHBOARD.SCHEDULE_EMPTY: No scheduled workouts for this period
COACH_DASHBOARD.EMPTY_RACE_GOALS: No race goals for this athlete.
COACH_DASHBOARD.PLACEHOLDER_SELECT_ATHLETE_DESC: Choose an athlete from the roster to view performance metrics, manage training loads, and track progression.

GROUP_MANAGEMENT.FIELD_GROUP_NAME_TITLE: A short label for grouping athletes (e.g. 'Sprint Group', 'Beginners')
GROUP_MANAGEMENT.FIELD_MAX_ATHLETES_TITLE: Maximum number of athletes allowed in this group. 0 means unlimited.
GROUP_MANAGEMENT.EMPTY_GROUPS: No groups yet. Use the form above to create your first group.
GROUP_MANAGEMENT.DELETE_GROUP_CONFIRM: Delete group "{{name}}"? This will remove it from all athletes.

LIVE_SESSION.STOP_CONFIRM_DESC: The workout is now paused. Choose how to proceed:

WORKOUT_SELECTION.EMPTY_STATE_DESC: Select a workout from the sidebar to view its details, or chat with the Assistant to generate a new training plan tailored to your profile.

WORKOUT_HISTORY.IMPORT_ERROR: Could not parse FIT file. Make sure it contains a valid session.
WORKOUT_HISTORY.EMPTY_HINT_UPLOAD: Upload a .FIT file to get started
WORKOUT_HISTORY.EMPTY_MAIN_DESC: Select an activity from the list to view detailed performance metrics and power data.

SESSION_ANALYSIS.NO_FIT_DATA: No FIT data stored for this session
SESSION_ANALYSIS.NO_FIT_HINT: Start a live session to auto-record time-series data, or import a .FIT file
SESSION_ANALYSIS.FIT_LOAD_ERROR: Could not load or parse the FIT file.

PACING.PAGE_SUBTITLE: Upload a GPX course file and generate an elevation-aware pacing plan
PACING.DROPZONE_HINT_GENERIC: Drop GPX file here or click to browse
PACING.SWIM_PANEL_DESC: No route data for swim — see swim summary above for pacing details.
PACING.ERROR_UPLOAD_REQUIRED_FILES: Please upload the required GPX file(s)

PMC.NO_PEAK_MSG: Adjust projection to find a peak form window.

PHYSIOLOGY.PAGE_SUBTITLE: Your physiological profile and training zones
PHYSIOLOGY.NO_REF_CTA: Set it in Settings to unlock zones.
PHYSIOLOGY.EMPTY_FTP: No FTP set. Update your reference values in Settings.
PHYSIOLOGY.EMPTY_THRESHOLD_PACE: No threshold pace set. Update your reference values in Settings.
PHYSIOLOGY.EMPTY_CSS: No critical swim speed set. Update your reference values in Settings.

GOALS.DETAIL_EMPTY_DESC: Select a goal to see details

RACES.BROWSE_EMPTY_CATALOG: No races in the catalog yet. Be the first to create one!

ZONE_MANAGER.PLACEHOLDER_AI_NOTES: Describe your zone conventions for the AI (e.g., 'Z2 = conversational pace, Z4 intervals use 1:1 rest')
ZONE_MANAGER.HINT_AI_NOTES: These notes help the AI understand your coaching conventions when creating workouts.
ZONE_MANAGER.EMPTY_EDITOR_DESC: Choose from the list or create a new zone system to configure training intensity ranges.

DEVICE_MANAGER.FOOTER_BLUETOOTH_HINT: Ensure your devices are in pairing mode and Bluetooth is enabled in your browser.

INVITE_CODE.SHARE_CODE_LABEL: Share this code with your athletes

SHARE_TRAINING.HINT_NO_TAGS: No tags available. Add tags to your athletes first.

TRAINING_ACTION.MSG_ALL_GROUPS_LINKED: All available groups already have a linked training for this session.
TRAINING_ACTION.HINT_DESCRIBE_NATURAL: Describe what you want to create in natural language.
TRAINING_ACTION.PLACEHOLDER_PROMPT: e.g. Create a 60-min sweet-spot group ride for Tuesday evening
TRAINING_ACTION.PLACEHOLDER_NOTES: e.g. Focus on cadence during intervals
TRAINING_ACTION.EMPTY_NO_TRAININGS: You don't have any trainings yet.
TRAINING_ACTION.SUCCESS_TRAINING_CREATED: Training created! Select it below to continue.

CREATE_WITH_AI.HINT_DESCRIBE_NATURAL: Describe what you want to create in natural language.
CREATE_WITH_AI.PLACEHOLDER_PROMPT_ZONE_CREATION: e.g. Create 7 power zones based on FTP for cycling, from Active Recovery to Neuromuscular
CREATE_WITH_AI.PLACEHOLDER_PROMPT_TRAINING_NOTATION: e.g. 1h sweet-spot session: 10min warm-up, 3x10min at 88-93% with 5min recovery, 10min cool-down
CREATE_WITH_AI.PLACEHOLDER_PROMPT_DEFAULT: e.g. Create a 60-min sweet-spot group ride for Tuesday evening at 7pm
CREATE_WITH_AI.HINT_PICK_TRAINING_SELECT: Pick one of your trainings to link to this session.
CREATE_WITH_AI.EMPTY_NO_TRAININGS: You don't have any trainings yet.

SESSION_DETAIL.NO_CHART_DATA: No time-series data available for this session
